metadata.title: International Institute of Islamic Bankers | Meezan Bank
metadata.description: International Institute of Islamic Bankers (IIIB) in an Islamic Banking & Finance learning, development & awareness initiative of Meezan Bank Limited. The courses offered by IIIB are designed by experienced industry experts in a way that covers all major aspect of Islamic Finance. These courses majorly comprise of short real life case-studies that offer practical knowledge and strengthen Islamic Finance knowledge base with specialization in the specific areas of your interest in this field.

content: Meezan EBiz+ LITE Login Meezan EBiz+ Login EBiz+ LITE Login EBiz+ Login Welcome to Institute of Islamic Bankers! About IIIB Certificate Courses If you found this page informative, share it now! Facebook LinkedIn X WhatsApp Email Print of Islamic Bankers of Islamic Bankers (IIIB) in an Islamic Banking & Finance learning, development & awareness initiative of Meezan Bank Limited. The courses offered by IIIB are designed by experienced industry experts in a way that covers all major aspect of Islamic Finance. These courses majorly comprise of short real life case-studies that offer practical knowledge and strengthen Islamic Finance knowledge base with specialization in the specific areas of your interest in this field. Our leading course titled: ‘Certificate in Islamic Banking and Finance’ is renowned in the industry for the following reasons: Certified by Meezan Bank Unique case-study based pedagogy designed by current industry practitioners Short sessions with Shariah scholars & industry experts (on availability) Pakistan’s First Institute accredited by Finance Accreditation Agency Malaysia (FAA) Competitive pricing – especially for group registrations These factors collectively contribute to the overall authenticity of this certificate. Why Islamic Bankers (IIIB) Islamic Bankers (IIIB) the training and development wing of Meezan Bank Limited welcomes you to the world of Islamic Finance. It is a network of students, researchers, bankers and Islamic Finance professionals at a global level who learn and share the latest industry practices. IIIB offers various courses in Islamic Finance and recognizes the importance of practicality of the knowledge provided to its students. We constantly update the curriculum to ensure that our members and students are edified with up-to-date industry practices making them an edge over the competitors in industry and become trained Islamic Finance business leaders. Moreover, we are committed to upholding the highest ethical and professional standards and maintaining public confidence Islamic Banking and Finance. of Islamic Bankers is Finance Accreditation Agency (FAA) of Malaysia. FAA is an independent quality assurance and accreditation body supported by Bank Negara Malaysia (Central Bank of Malaysia) and Securities Commission Malaysia. OUR MISSION ‘To strengthen the foundations of the global Islamic Financial Industry by delivering practical knowledge about Islamic Finance to individuals’ Governance Shariah Expert Panel Mufti Muhammad Imran Ashraf Usmani, (Chairman) Mufti Muhammad Naveed Alam Mufti Muhammad Sadiq Mufti Zubair Ahmed Faculty Members Mr. Ahmed Ali Siddiqui (Head of Faculty) Mr. Farhan ul Haq Usmani (Deputy Head of Faculty) Mr. Shayan Ahmed Baig Mr. Shariq Ahmed Khan Mufti Muhammad Arif Khan Mufti Abdul Rauf Hafiz Form submitted successfully Thank you for contacting us! Our representative will call you within 2 working days. Do you have another query? Feel free to re-fill the form and submit it again Would you like more information about IIIB? Fill out the form below and you will be contacted by a Meezan Bank representative. MeezanGPT Assalam o Alaikum! How can I be of service to you today?
